# a2a-compliance

> Automated compliance test kit and security audit for A2A (Agent2Agent)
> protocol endpoints. Operator-facing: validates real deployments, fails
> CI on regression, drops SARIF into GitHub code-scanning. TypeScript /
> Node 22+. Sibling to `a2aproject/a2a-tck` (Python, aimed at SDK
> authors).

Install: `npx @a2a-compliance/cli run <url>` — zero local setup.

## Packages

- [@a2a-compliance/cli](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@a2a-compliance/cli): command-line probe; primary entry point
- [@a2a-compliance/core](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@a2a-compliance/core): assertion engine, reporters, HTTP client with SSRF + DNS-pin
- [@a2a-compliance/schemas](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@a2a-compliance/schemas): Zod schemas for A2A agent card, task, message, JSON-RPC envelope

## Docs

- [README.md](https://github.com/UltraSkye/a2a-compliance/blob/main/README.md): overview + quick-start + use cases
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/UltraSkye/a2a-compliance/blob/main/AGENTS.md): AI-agent-facing quick reference with code snippets
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](https://github.com/UltraSkye/a2a-compliance/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): layering, check-id taxonomy, capability-gated severity
- [docs/A2A_SECURITY_TOP_10.md](https://github.com/UltraSkye/a2a-compliance/blob/main/docs/A2A_SECURITY_TOP_10.md): ten classes of A2A endpoint defect we see in the wild
- [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/UltraSkye/a2a-compliance/blob/main/SECURITY.md): threat model + reporting

## Checks (high level)

- **card.\***: agent card reachable, valid JSON, schema-conformant, HTTPS, declared `protocolVersion`, skills present
- **rpc.\***: JSON-RPC 2.0 envelope (-32700 / -32600 / -32601), batch support, method-specific probes
- **methods.\***: `message/send`, `message/stream`, `tasks/get`, `tasks/cancel`, `tasks/resubscribe`, `tasks/pushNotificationConfig/*` (v0.3 + v1.0 names)
- **sec.\***: SSRF, TLS enforcement, CORS `*`-with-credentials, redirect-chain re-check
- **auth.\***: anonymous-challenge, OAuth/OIDC discovery reachability
- **spec.\***: version-compatibility metadata

Each check carries `category`, `severity` (`must` / `should` / `info`),
and a `specRef` pointing back into the A2A / JSON-RPC spec. Reports
end with a `ComplianceTier` (`NON_COMPLIANT` / `MANDATORY` /
`RECOMMENDED` / `FULL_FEATURED`).

## Outputs

JSON (stdout), JUnit XML, SARIF 2.1.0, Shields SVG badge, snapshot
diff against a baseline. Every artefact usable offline.

## Reference implementation

[examples/reference-agent/](https://github.com/UltraSkye/a2a-compliance/tree/main/examples/reference-agent)
ships a minimal zero-dep A2A server implementing the v1.0 method set.
Use it as a known-compliant fixture or as teaching material.

## Optional

- [apps/web/](https://github.com/UltraSkye/a2a-compliance/tree/main/apps/web): Next.js dashboard with SSRF ingress guard
- [apps/action/](https://github.com/UltraSkye/a2a-compliance/tree/main/apps/action): GitHub composite action
- [.github/workflows/spec-drift.yml](https://github.com/UltraSkye/a2a-compliance/blob/main/.github/workflows/spec-drift.yml): weekly cron that hashes upstream A2A artefacts and opens an issue on drift
